questions.question: Who was the lawyer hired to present the case against Paul before Felix?
Why did Felix keep Paul in prison for two years?
options: He wanted a bribe from Paul
questions.answer: He wanted a bribe from Paul

questions.question: Felix was alarmed when Paul spoke about righteousness, self-control, and the coming judgment.
Paul said he worshiped the God of his ancestors as a follower of the _____, which they call a sect.
Felix was succeeded as governor by Porcius _____.
